suite.name: suite S1780230829359 2

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 — Successful Login With Valid Credentials

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: When User Enters Valid Credentials
Enter Username
Then User Should See Success Message
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.name: TC_002 — Failed Login With Wrong Password

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: When User Enters Wrong Password
Enter Username
Then User Should See Wrong Password Error
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.name: TC_003 — Failed Login With Wrong Username

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Then User Should See Wrong Username Error
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.name: TC_004 — Logout After Successful Login

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: When User Enters Valid Credentials
Enter Username
Then User Should See Logout Confirmation
And User Should Be Redirected To Login Page
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

suite.doc: Tests for Login functionality on The Internet
